query:
UPDATE project_amenities 
SET imageUrl = CASE name
  WHEN 'Swimming Pool' THEN '/images/amenities/swimming-pool.jpg'
  WHEN 'Gymnasium' THEN '/images/amenities/gym.jpg'
  WHEN 'Clubhouse' THEN '/images/amenities/clubhouse.jpg'
  WHEN 'Children''s Play Area' THEN '/images/amenities/kids-play.jpg'
  WHEN 'Landscaped Gardens' THEN '/images/amenities/garden-lounge.jpg'
  ELSE imageUrl
END
WHERE projectId = (SELECT id FROM projects WHERE slug = 'pride-purple-park-eden')
AND name IN ('Swimming Pool', 'Gymnasium', 'Clubhouse', 'Children''s Play Area', 'Landscaped Gardens');
